column2:
Goal is to gradually add to this list of albums I
think are great that I noticed are not included in the list...
When you hit 1001 albums listened to, order this list 
chronologically and copy and paste into my 1001 list....
I am thinking that this list will have to be around 650 
freaking albums to make up the difference haha....
